title: Lightoller's Falsified Boat Manifest
description: A folded White Star Line departure manifest found in Second Officer Lightoller's breast pocket — or on the officer's table on the Boat Deck — recording the passenger count for each lifeboat lowered. Boats 7, 5, 3, and 1 are listed with inflated numbers: Boat 7 is recorded as '41' when the actual count was 28, Boat 5 as '55' when it held 36. The handwriting is Lightoller's, and the corrections — visible as faint erasure marks under the lamplight — are damning evidence that the under-loading has been systematic and concealed.
